mapper.select:
WITH -- 步骤1: 获取所有已确认入库的明细，按入库日期排序（FIFO顺序） ordered_in_details AS ( SELECT sid.in_detail_id, sid.in_id, sid.item_type, sid.item_id, sid.item_code, sid.item_name, sid.category_name, sid.unit_name, sid.batch_number, sid.quantity AS in_quantity, sid.expiry_date, sid.production_date, sid.storage_location, si.prod_unit_id, si.in_code, si.in_date, si.in_status, -- 按 FIFO 顺序编号（同一仓库、同一物品内按入库日期排序） ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY si.prod_unit_id, sid.item_type, sid.item_id ORDER BY si.in_date ASC, sid.in_detail_id ASC ) AS fifo_order FROM stock_in_detail sid INNER JOIN stock_in si ON sid.in_id = si.in_id WHERE si.in_status = 'completed' AND sid.expiry_date IS NOT NULL ),
-- 步骤2: 汇总每个物品的总出库数量 total_out_by_item AS ( SELECT s.prod_unit_id, s.item_type, s.item_id, COALESCE(SUM(ABS(st.quantity_change)), 0) AS total_out_quantity FROM stock s LEFT JOIN stock_transaction st ON s.stock_id = st.stock_id AND st.transaction_type = 'out' GROUP BY s.prod_unit_id, s.item_type, s.item_id ),
-- 步骤3: 计算累计入库数量 cumulative_calc AS ( SELECT oid.*, -- 累计入库数量（到当前行为止） SUM(oid.in_quantity) OVER ( PARTITION BY oid.prod_unit_id, oid.item_type, oid.item_id ORDER BY oid.fifo_order ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW ) AS cumulative_in_quantity, -- 获取该物品的总出库数量 COALESCE(toi.total_out_quantity, 0) AS total_out_quantity FROM ordered_in_details oid LEFT JOIN total_out_by_item toi ON oid.prod_unit_id = toi.prod_unit_id AND oid.item_type = toi.item_type AND oid.item_id = toi.item_id ),
-- 步骤4: 计算上一行的累计入库数量 fifo_calculation AS ( SELECT cc.*, -- 上一行的累计入库数量（用于计算当前行被扣减的数量） LAG(cc.cumulative_in_quantity, 1, 0) OVER ( PARTITION BY cc.prod_unit_id, cc.item_type, cc.item_id ORDER BY cc.fifo_order ) AS prev_cumulative_in_quantity FROM cumulative_calc cc )
-- 步骤4: 计算每个入库明细的实际剩余数量 SELECT fc.in_detail_id AS inDetailId, s.stock_id AS stockId, fc.item_type AS itemType, fc.item_id AS itemId, fc.item_code AS itemCode, fc.item_name AS itemName, fc.category_name AS categoryName, fc.unit_name AS unitName, fc.batch_number AS batchNumber, fc.in_quantity AS inQuantity, -- 计算已出库数量（FIFO规则） CASE -- 情况1: 总出库数量 <= 上一行累计入库数量（当前行完全未被出库） WHEN fc.total_out_quantity <= fc.prev_cumulative_in_quantity THEN 0 -- 情况2: 总出库数量 >= 当前行累计入库数量（当前行完全被出库） WHEN fc.total_out_quantity >= fc.cumulative_in_quantity THEN fc.in_quantity -- 情况3: 部分出库（当前行被部分扣减） ELSE fc.total_out_quantity - fc.prev_cumulative_in_quantity END AS outQuantity, -- 计算实际剩余数量 fc.in_quantity - CASE WHEN fc.total_out_quantity <= fc.prev_cumulative_in_quantity THEN 0 WHEN fc.total_out_quantity >= fc.cumulative_in_quantity THEN fc.in_quantity ELSE fc.total_out_quantity - fc.prev_cumulative_in_quantity END AS remainingQuantity, fc.expiry_date AS expiryDate, fc.production_date AS productionDate, fc.prod_unit_id AS prodUnitId, fc.storage_location AS storageLocation, fc.in_id AS inId, fc.in_code AS inCode, fc.in_date AS inDate, fc.in_status AS inStatus FROM fifo_calculation fc LEFT JOIN stock s ON s.prod_unit_id = fc.prod_unit_id AND s.item_type = fc.item_type AND s.item_id = fc.item_id WHERE fc.expiry_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} -- 只返回实际剩余数量 > 0 的记录 AND (fc.in_quantity - CASE WHEN fc.total_out_quantity <= fc.prev_cumulative_in_quantity THEN 0 WHEN fc.total_out_quantity >= fc.cumulative_in_quantity THEN fc.in_quantity ELSE fc.total_out_quantity - fc.prev_cumulative_in_quantity END) > 0
AND fc.item_type = #{itemType}
AND fc.prod_unit_id = #{prodUnitId}
ORDER BY fc.expiry_date ASC, fc.in_date ASC

WITH ordered_in_details AS ( SELECT sid.in_detail_id, sid.item_type, sid.item_id, sid.quantity AS in_quantity, sid.expiry_date, si.prod_unit_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY si.prod_unit_id, sid.item_type, sid.item_id ORDER BY si.in_date ASC, sid.in_detail_id ASC ) AS fifo_order FROM stock_in_detail sid INNER JOIN stock_in si ON sid.in_id = si.in_id WHERE si.in_status = 'completed' AND sid.expiry_date IS NOT NULL ), total_out_by_item AS ( SELECT s.prod_unit_id, s.item_type, s.item_id, COALESCE(SUM(ABS(st.quantity_change)), 0) AS total_out_quantity FROM stock s LEFT JOIN stock_transaction st ON s.stock_id = st.stock_id AND st.transaction_type = 'out' GROUP BY s.prod_unit_id, s.item_type, s.item_id ), -- 计算累计入库数量 cumulative_calc AS ( SELECT oid.*, SUM(oid.in_quantity) OVER ( PARTITION BY oid.prod_unit_id, oid.item_type, oid.item_id ORDER BY oid.fifo_order ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW ) AS cumulative_in_quantity, COALESCE(toi.total_out_quantity, 0) AS total_out_quantity FROM ordered_in_details oid LEFT JOIN total_out_by_item toi ON oid.prod_unit_id = toi.prod_unit_id AND oid.item_type = toi.item_type AND oid.item_id = toi.item_id ), -- 计算上一行的累计入库数量 fifo_calculation AS ( SELECT cc.*, LAG(cc.cumulative_in_quantity, 1, 0) OVER ( PARTITION BY cc.prod_unit_id, cc.item_type, cc.item_id ORDER BY cc.fifo_order ) AS prev_cumulative_in_quantity FROM cumulative_calc cc ) SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS urgentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(expiry_date, CURDATE()) > 7 AND DATEDIFF(expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warningCount, SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(expiry_date, CURDATE()) > 30 AND DATEDIFF(expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS infoCount, COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM fifo_calculation fc WHERE fc.expiry_date >= CURDATE() AND fc.expiry_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND (fc.in_quantity - CASE WHEN fc.total_out_quantity <= fc.prev_cumulative_in_quantity THEN 0 WHEN fc.total_out_quantity >= fc.cumulative_in_quantity THEN fc.in_quantity ELSE fc.total_out_quantity - fc.prev_cumulative_in_quantity END) > 0
